race.description: Welcome To Mvrc Country Boosted Hcp (Bm58)
race.comment: Tough race to end the day. EXCEED ME (3) finished second first-up, then flopped badly with a fading on-pace seventh over 1210m at Port Macquarie. Key jockey change and has since been kept up to the mark with a 1004m trial. Set to bounce back. DIRTY DOES IT (5) doesn't win out of turn and assess on the good minor placing two-back. Struck trouble at the start and warmed up late with a respectable fifth over 1000m at Muswellbrook. Should race closer today and take a hand in the finish. MISS DE BLAAS (6) has progressed nicely in her last couple of runs. Stalked the speed and was rewarded for her consistency with a dominant win over 1007m at this track. Zac Wadick sticks and is sure to be thereabouts. BRAZEN BRANDO (4) tough old gelding holding his form. Has a decent heavy track record and can overcome the sticky gate.
